reviews.review_text: The community genuinely sucks. Just awful people. Play with friends or turn off all the interaction you have with other players.
One of my favorites.. simple, accessible and fun. Got worse when Epic took over but still fun.
Used to be good, now it is trash since Epic's acquisition. Latency very high, microstutters everytime someone joins the match. Unbalanced matchmaking.

I've been playing this game since 2015. I cannot believe I've spent 11 years on a single game. With every single year the skill ceiling rose and so did the toxicity. I've met some of the most wholesome down to earth people as well as some of the most toxic people. Amazing communities formed around this game, as well as cheating and botting communities. No game has ever been safe from cheaters and there are definitely better ways to prevent cheaters from ruining this game. With all that said I can guarantee that anyone who has touched this game has experienced controller breaking lows but also mind numbingly incredible highs. As someone who has an indescribable amount of time in FIFA and Racing games before playing this absolute GEM of a game, I can easily say if I had the opportunity to stop myself from buying this off the PS store in 2015 I wouldn't. In fact I would have encouraged my past self to devote twice the time I did in the early years of this game. For those who love self improvement and self humbling experiences this is the game for you. give it a try.

"Anti-cheat authentication timeout" kicks me from game. Rejoin to no teammate. FF and try to requeue. "Banned from matchmaking for 10 minutes for AFK." Maybe instead of wasting time moving to UE6 we could actually FIX THE GAME.

Epic games are literally the worst type of game developers, they only care about money. At least Psyonix listened to their community somewhat, epic games just fire the people who care about the game and want to make it better. SORT YOUR BOTS AND SMURFS OUT YOU LAZY PEICES OF $#&£!!!
A bit hard mechanics,enjoyable,skins are cool,creative. Has many mods solo,duo,trio,squad with good events,

constant lag i have good internet. its so frustrating that every game not only do i have to play at my best but i have to hope that the ball doesn't just zip past me or look like its going one direction then shoot off in another because of the lag. i hadn't played this game for almost a year was happy to get back into it but why grind when half my matches are just trying to play against lag.

server issues all the time, smurfs everywhere and the ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ impossible solo que experience. got people front flipping and stuck on the ground in c2. mind blowing the mix of ♥♥♥♥ and ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ in this game. good team mate percentage is around 5%. (im mvp most games and have had games where i am on 600-1000+ score and my mate is on 50 many many times) also passing is a forgotten language in 2s. its where 1s players go to hit clips with a full back defender

Game was ruined after it was bought by the Chinese. Pay to win schemes are put in place and you have to pay for the best car in the game that every pro uses and anyone with a brain above diamond will as well. Take me back to this game 10 years ago when it was good.

Then the players who can't kick a real soccer ball play this all the time and think they ammount to something, overall you're bound to leave it like most with common sense have already.
This game imbues an anger and rage inside me upon whiffing that I have not been able to recreate with any other phenomena or substance since. Amazing

I love RL, but this newest update with the EAC is causing INSANE frame drops. I understand the need for it due to bots being disgusting, but dropping from 165 fps to 20 fps for a split second is unacceptable. Do better.

Will updated recommendation once this bs is fixed.

UPDATE: Had a frame drop to literally 12 during a RANKED MATCH. This game is unplayable with its current state. Congratulations ePiC GAmEs, you ruined a perfect game.

UPDATE 2: had a frame drop to 7.46 :)))))))))))))) this game is unplayable atm, I hate epic games with a passion.

Base game fun, despite car hitboxes NOT AT ALL lining up (they are literally rectangles that can be half a car width off).

I want a pair of wheels in painted form from the tournament reward pool. I have to be "tournament GC" to get painted items. To rankup in "tournament mode" I have to play specifically the vanilla tournament mode, which only happens every two hours on average, but at randomly chosen hours throughout the day. It means you end up dedicating the whole ass day to playing this video game. Not worth my time so I uninstalled.

Also we lost a match, and during the replay I pressed "leave tournament" to go to the menu, which gave me a temporary ban despite the game being over. Salt in the eyes man.
this game brings a rage out of me that no other could. i hate this game with a passion and will probably continue to play the game until its completely dead

one of the games that i spent so much time on while growing as a person! from learning how to play to becoming a top 1% player, this game can be life changing (good and bad!) and can be very comforting with the warm colors. what a wonderful game ♡

Grandoso oh so bitter sweet ball, who is the bounciest of them all, whether you miss or whether you score, there is always a backflip awaiting next door.

If you have friends, this game is great, I am a former competitive solo player, as per usual every game I play mostly solo, and this game pretty much died for me, there is no reason to take it seriously, the esports is nowhere near the level it could have been, the devs are mashing new cosmetics in, what's new, you'll always find the most disturbed teenagers raging or ragebaiting you in public lobbies, and I know of a certain group of people who are the absolute scum of the earth and they came from Rocket League, so.. of course, this is a positive review, getting on the game with some old buddies of mine, especially irl friends is a true rejuvenation and feels just right.
won't play a game with any kernel level access, and I can't recommend it to you either.

This game is really hard to balance due to software limitations and network systems. So pinching the ball by slamming it from two sides can result in self-goals and you'll most likely almost always hate your teammate for any slight mistake or judgment error they do. But this game is very unique and it was a trendsetter back when it first released. I enjoyed and spent lots of hours in it on multiple platforms. Great game to play with friends and chill, even on a split screen console session.

It is relatively easy to learn, very hard to master. So you'll probably be shocked when you see someone dribble the ball across the sky while flying and twirling.

Trading items in this game allows you to make use of your previously unused cosmetics. However, the downside of that is in the middle of gaming sessions someone will stop playing to ask you to sell/trade your equipment sometimes (lol)

I rate it [b]8.5/10[/b]
Cannot actually play this game on linux. Very disappointing as the dev proudly display that the game runs but are not willing to allow linux to play online. Without online play the game is not fun.
The dumbest rules of the game: you are at one level and the player you are playing is at a much lower level because it doesn't respond to any reports
At the request of the publisher, Rocket League® is unlisted on the Steam store and will not appear in search.

I can feel the very essence of my being unraveling every time I play this game. There are basically no people worth interacting with left in-game. Almost everyone who isn't a maladjusted degenerate or socially-stunted COVID kid turned off their social features a long time ago. I don't know why I keep fooling myself. It's the only game in my life I have ever hate-played because nothing can touch it.

Game doesn't have an equal, community is ruined, and you can't get it here without paying 400 dollars for a grey market CD Key.

But don't worry. UE6 will ensure the game's success for the next 10 years!

A 22 billion dollar company has this many issues on a game that theoretically shouldn't have a lot of server load. Epic Games Support was also completely unhelpful and closed the support chat on me mid conversation about the issue. Epic Games continues it's wave of taking over games and making them a cesspool of issues and mainstream degeneracy. A whole hour, nay decade wasted.

almost 5k hours on here, about 3k on console. Fantastic mechanics, insanely high skill ceiling for those who are dedicated to it... But we've lost so many great features over the years, especially since Epic purchased the game. Would still recommend, very fun time, but I almost feel that there's hardly even motivation to befriend others within RL now. Trading and wearing cosmetics with your friends brought a since of community that doesn't exist anymore since Epic removed the feature. If that ever returns, 10/10.  and still a fun time without it, 8/10.

this game, is much more than just rocket soccar. there is multiple levels of skill and physics to master. its much more difficult than you would imagine it would be. it will feel like you have no control over your vehicle for months and then it will click. you will understand certain movements to position yourself in advantageous spots to stay offensive or defensive. understand the camera angle and how to read the bounce of the ball, learning jump mechanics. started with controller, then immediately swapped to keyboard and mouse with "MOUSE X" (movement left and right) as my air roll right and left, jump left click, boost right click, (REVERSED from default). it feels like an FPS shooter where you aim/boost with your middle finger and then shoot/jump with your pointer finger. then i just move my mouse left and right at anytime for precise air roll movements that i can lock to any angle with ease and correct from any bump, bad landing or 50/50 (clash of two cars at the ball) where you would need to recover to be able to maintain defensive/offensive as quickly as possible. what im saying is mess with the settings and test it out in free play and training packs. try out different button layouts. trust me. you will adapt and grow. learn and have fun my fellow gamers.
Since the anticheat update the game is unplayable. 3 Fps at it's best

For the average solo 3v3 player, this game is not fun. I started keeping track and about 80% of my games in diamond 3 were against a party of 3 with one or two smurfs or just high ranked players but the average MMR is pulled down significantly by the other partymember(s).
It was fun for a while, however for the last few seasons it's been nothing but this...
I don't wish to climb, I've been at diamond 3 since before Epic took over. I enjoy playing this game for fun, but the fun ended when people were able to make new accounts continuously for free.

I've got most likely close to 2k hours (almost 1200 here on Steam at the time of this review, the rest previously accrued on console) and it's tough for me to recommend this game wholesale to everyone, but in a vacuum this game delivers on exactly what it aims to offer-  a physics-based car soccer experience that runs like a dream (servers not withstanding) and is accessible to pretty much anyone. My caveat is that there is a fairly steep learning curve, so if you're aiming to jump in with friends that have been playing for a while you're gonna have a rough time for a long time. But it's one of those games that if you get an itch for it there's really nothing else that can scratch it. So with that said, the barrier to entry is low- give it a shot, and if you like it you won't mind the learning curve. If it's not really hitting with you, it's not gonna be worth the effort.
Game is unplayable since the anti cheat update. Been playing for a decade and I guess it's time to give it up since there is just phantom latency every game.
This game has gone totally down the drain since it was sold. What a dumpster fire. All they care about is microtransactions. Trash app. Get bent.

Rocket league is the most toxic game of them all. Chat should be disabled. 
Even the game trolls you in addition the other players. If both you and your team mate vote to forfeit a tournament, because your team mate decides to score own goals, then you get a 10 minute ban. Those that play controller get twice as many degree's of freedom with controls. 
They make you open 100's of "drop's" to get nothing worth while. No real customisation, just fixed textures and models.

Still don't have all the achievements in this game, not good, or not fun. Haven't decided yet. Don't play this game if you want the achievements because i want them first, so don't get them before me.

[h1]I miss old Rocket League[/h1]

Back when Rocket League was paid and exclusive to Steam, this game was an absolute masterpiece.

It's still fun and insanely addictive, but nowadays the matchmaking feels weird, smurfs are everywhere, and removing item trading was such a terrible decision.

[hr][/hr]

[list]
[*]Easy to understand
[*]Extremely hard to master
[*]One of the most addictive competitive games ever
[*]Also one of the most frustrating
[/list]

I still come back to it from time to time...

Then I lose 4 ranked matches in a row against people clearly below Champ for some reason and remember why I stopped playing.

Epic Games knows no bounds for their greed, ruined a beloved game with their bs. Don't want to sign up for an EG account? Good luck playing, its going to spam you non stop causing you to alt-tab out of your game.

The game has progressed to a point where the endless glitches, lobby errors, and failed matchmaking issues make it unplayable. It works some of the time- but when it doesn't- be prepared to click "rejoin match" twenty consecutive times before receiving a matchmaking ban.
It's a unique game, nothing like it. 10/10. Just sucks its owned by a soley money hungry company like epic.

No one should ever play this game, the amount of cheaters, bots, and toxic players is unreal. Easy anti cheat was added and somehow it got worse. Psyonix refuses to fix ♥♥♥♥ because all the cheaters boost their player count. maybe a class action lawsuit would force them to fix their ♥♥♥♥♥♥ game.
hurry up and something about the the accounts run by bots that is ruining ranked gameplay

at first it was fun, driving around and missing the ball and it rolling in but still claming that it was a intentional fake, the days of flying off the wall and hiting the floor with the side of my car because i tried to airdribble with no boost... these were the days that made rocket league rocket league... but when it suddenly became ranked and the winner was decided by who whiffed the most times infront of there own net... u lean the harsh truth that u actually hate this game... and sometimes the game hates you... and when u finnaly hit ssl (1800 mmr) u learn that your not actually at the top, your actually half way ( aeound 2500-2800mmr) so i hate this game... but i also hate my ex and i call her 3 times a week...
